qa_pairs.question: Where can I find a glossary of cloud technical terms?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find a glossary of cloud technical terms by referring to the Cloud Technical Glossary.

qa_pairs.question: How can I learn more about automating VM creation?
qa_pairs.answer: You can learn more about automating VM creation by visiting the "automating VM creation" page.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information on backing up my virtual machine?
qa_pairs.answer: Information on backing up your VM is available on the "backing up your VM" page.

qa_pairs.question: Who should I contact if I have questions about the cloud service?
qa_pairs.answer: For questions about the cloud service, you should email technical support.
